name: Can I sue my NY attorney for using fake AI-generated cases in my filing?
description: Yes, sue for malpractice if harm resulted from unverified fake AI cases; prove negligence and damages.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my NY attorney for using fake AI-generated cases in my filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue for malpractice if harm resulted from unverified fake AI cases; prove negligence and damages.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if negligence or malpractice caused harm like case dismissal or adverse rulings. The Levidow firm was sanctioned for unverified ChatGPT cases, showing breach of duty to ensure accurate citations.[1] Key factors: provable damages, failure to verify AI, bad faith persistence. Gather court orders, filing records; file a malpractice claim within NY's 3-year statute. Discipline via attorney grievance doesn't preclude civil suit. Act quickly to preserve evidence.
